subject: We’ve accomplished so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You sacrificed a lot. I can’t begin to thank you enough. |

Friend, We’ve accomplished so much during our first week in office -- and it’s only getting started. You’re soon going to remember what it feels like when America WINS! But we need to make sure we sustain everything we build over these next four years so that we can Keep America Great for years and years to come. Our Party is taking care of that. We’re setting goals each month to ensure we have the resources for the BEST messaging, the BEST data, and the BEST ground game. But right now, we still have $735,148 to go to hit our January goal set by our terrific new chairwoman. Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $5 to help us CRUSH this goal by the end-of-month FEC deadline. I know you sacrificed a lot during the election. I can’t begin to thank you enough. But winning the election was only step one. We now have to fix this terrible mess, and we have to ensure we never go back down that road of the last eight years. I’m asking you to go above and beyond and help our new chairwoman hit her first goal by the end of the month. Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $5 to help us CRUSH this goal by the end-of-month FEC deadline. Thank you, Donald J. Trump
CONTRIBUTE $100

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecbba4PvBAHXWuCIlWfaG-CsDRMN6aaaaNUFeBMIZN4ua?t=3@132405&d=eoxhmkjr76_hlbhm.bpl&m=k&y=
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of the Republican National Committee's online community. If you have any questions, concerns, or thoughts on the Republican Party, just click here to send us a message! If you'd like more information on the GOP platform or to volunteer, visit gop.com. Getting emails from the RNC is one of the best ways to stay up-to-date on our fight to take back the White House, but if you really want to scale back, click here to receive less email or click here to unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $5 to help us CRUSH this goal by the end-of-month FEC deadline.

name: Gerry Heard
subject: Without the Affordable Care Act, I will likely die
body:
Help me defend the ACA **Read why the Affordable Care Act matters to Gerry, and then say you're in to defend it:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170128_sup_nd&source=em_20170128_sup_nd")**
To all of you out there who are willing to fight back:

One day, in November of 2006, I went to see my doctor because of unbearable back pain. The doctor suggested that I get a routine checkup just to make sure that everything was ok -- but, a few days later, I received a call telling me to come back to the doctor's office as soon as possible.

When I arrived, my doctor sat me down and told me that I had stage four prostate cancer that had spread to my bones. Because it was caught so late, it was too late for standard treatment. My only option was to participate in an experimental trial.

I was told to stop work immediately to focus on battling my disease, but I could not afford to and went to working part-time instead. Although I was enrolled in Medicare, I needed supplemental health insurance to pick up what Medicare didn't. I applied for everything under the sun but was rejected time and time again because my cancer was considered a pre-existing condition.

But that all changed with the Affordable Care Act. Suddenly, insurance companies could no longer deny me or others coverage because of pre-existing conditions like cancer -- and I was finally able to purchase a supplemental insurance plan.

If the Affordable Care Act is repealed, I will lose my health insurance. Without it, because I cannot afford to pay out-of-pocket for expensive cancer treatments or new experimental drugs, I will likely die.

Although I am not cured of cancer, I am thankful that the Affordable Care Act is giving me a chance to fight. I wish every day that I had gone to the doctor sooner -- if I had gone for a checkup even when I didn't think I needed to, maybe then I would have caught my cancer in time.

That's one of the things that worries me the most about the attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act: the possibility that free cancer screenings will stop. It keeps me up at night thinking about all the people who also won't have the opportunity to catch their cancer in time because they won't be able to see a doctor for a screening that is no longer free.

I am just one of millions of Americans whose life has been saved because of the Affordable Care Act. To take it away now would be catastrophic for us all. Please join me and other Democrats in the fight to save the ACA. The more people in this fight, the more people can keep their health insurance. **Add your name to tell Congress to protect affordable health care:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170128_sup_nd&source=em_20170128_sup_nd")**
Thank you,

Gerry Heard
Ann Arbor, MI

P.S. -- Back pain is a symptom of prostate cancer. I didn't know that, but now you do! Make sure you get your regular checkups with your doctor.

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c730/4067b0a/239400d6b/7e7b4b6f/1282769058/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170128_sup_nd&source=em_20170128_sup_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c730/4067b0a/239400d6b/7e7b4b6c/1282769058/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170128_sup_nd&source=em_20170128_sup_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c730/4067b0a/239400d6b/7e7b4b6d/1282769058/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170128_sup_nd&source=em_20170128_sup_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c730/4067b0a/239400d6b/7e7b4b6a/1282769058/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170128_sup_nd&source=em_20170128_sup_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

subject: We’ve accomplished so much

body:
You sacrificed a lot. I can’t begin to thank you enough. |

Friend, We’ve accomplished so much during our first week in office -- and it’s only getting started. You’re soon going to remember what it feels like when America WINS! But we need to make sure we sustain everything we build over these next four years so that we can Keep America Great for years and years to come. Our Party is taking care of that. We’re setting goals each month to ensure we have the resources for the BEST messaging, the BEST data, and the BEST ground game. But right now, we still have $735,148 to go to hit our January goal set by our terrific new chairwoman. Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $5 to help us CRUSH this goal by the end-of-month FEC deadline. I know you sacrificed a lot during the election. I can’t begin to thank you enough. But winning the election was only step one. We now have to fix this terrible mess, and we have to ensure we never go back down that road of the last eight years. I’m asking you to go above and beyond and help our new chairwoman hit her first goal by the end of the month. Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $5 to help us CRUSH this goal by the end-of-month FEC deadline. Thank you, Donald J. Trump

clean_body: You sacrificed a lot. I can’t begin to thank you enough. | Friend, We’ve accomplished so much during our first week in office -- and it’s only getting started. You’re soon going to remember what it feels like when America WINS! But we need to make sure we sustain everything we build over these next four years so that we can Keep America Great for years and years to come. Our Party is taking care of that. We’re setting goals each month to ensure we have the resources for the BEST messaging, the BEST data, and the BEST ground game. But right now, we still have $735,148 to go to hit our January goal set by our terrific new chairwoman. Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $5 to help us CRUSH this goal by the end-of-month FEC deadline. I know you sacrificed a lot during the election. I can’t begin to thank you enough. But winning the election was only step one. We now have to fix this terrible mess, and we have to ensure we never go back down that road of the last eight years. I’m asking you to go above and beyond and help our new chairwoman hit her first goal by the end of the month. Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $5 to help us CRUSH this goal by the end-of-month FEC deadline. Thank you, Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100 Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Worst-case scenario
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends,
By nature, I am an optimist. I believe the strength of our country comes not from politicians, but from the people themselves - our drive for innovation, our spirit of inclusion, our shared conviction that we can overcome any obstacle together.

What harms us is refusing to acknowledge our diversity - and the fact that despite our political differences, we are still one nation with considerable promise and considerable responsibility to our neighbors.

But the first 8 days of the Trump Administration have been, in a word, unreal. Truly scary stuff. So far we've witnessed President Trump and his team:
* Declare war on the free press, calling it an "opposition party"
* Announce plans to reinstate torture abroad
* Initiate plans to build a wall along the border
* Issue executive orders targeting immigrants and denying healthcare to millions
* Scrub climate change efforts from the White House website and federal agencies
* Demand an investigation into non-existent voter fraud for an election he already won
* Double-down on lies at press conferences to feign popular support for these proposals

In my heart of hearts, I was hoping that the weight of the office might..._might..._ transform Trump. The awesome responsibility of representing the entire nation after an acrimonious campaign could have been humbling and unifying. But after only 8 days that seems impossible.

It is more important now than ever that we unite our party. Democrats must come together and right the ship. We can't let Trump's damage to our ideals last one more minute more than it has to. The outreach, messaging, and organizing for the 2018 midterms must begin now.

I plan to stay active here in Florida, as too much of what we've fought for over the past 8 years could be lost. And together, we'll be able to fight back stronger.

\-- Patrick |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e33/738133e4/3316cfbe/7f85b5ff/3795722668/VEsH/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e33/738133e4/3316cfbe/7f85b5f8/3795722668/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2016 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved

---

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It's time to get to work for the people of North Carolina. Are you ready?
It's time to get to work for the people of North Carolina. Are you ready?
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202923/2fde7c66/439fe382/15691f4e/2901409110/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/are-you-ready-add-your-name?utm_campaign=em17_170128_ncga_adv_gq_nonsig_rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170128_ncga_adv_gq_nonsig_rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
It's time, friends. After a long and difficult election, the 2017 legislative session officially kicked off this week. It's time to get to work for the people of North Carolina. I'm going to work hard to build consensus with leaders from both sides -- but I also know that, at times, there will be disagreements. I will always fight for what I believe in, and I need to know you're with me. Are you ready? | | [**Yes, I 'm in ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202923/2fde7c66/439fe382/15691f4e/2901409110/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/are-you-ready-add-your-name?utm_campaign=em17_170128_ncga_adv_gq_nonsig_rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170128_ncga_adv_gq_nonsig_rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
I've made my priorities for this session clear and I believe they will help move our state forward:
* Repealing HB2 would send the message that North Carolina is open for business, no matter who you are.
* Expanding Medicaid would insure hundreds of thousands of North Carolinians and would bring tens of thousands of jobs to our state.
* Investing in public schools instead of more corporate tax giveaways will provide more opportunities for everyone.
* And our neighbors in Eastern North Carolina need our help rebuilding after Hurricane Matthew.

Your support helped us accomplish something incredible in 2016. And now, with your help, these are all things we can get done this session.
But I need to know you're still with me.
**[Add your name to show you've got my back.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202923/2fde7c66/439fe382/15691f4e/2901409110/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/are-you-ready-add-your-name?utm_campaign=em17_170128_ncga_adv_gq_nonsig_rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170128_ncga_adv_gq_nonsig_rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Thanks for all you continue to do for North Carolina,
Roy

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 10587
Raleigh NC 27605 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202923/2fde7c66/439fe382/15691f41/2901409110/VEsC/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe")

Investing in public schools instead of more corporate tax giveaways will provide more opportunities for everyone. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Compassion as resistance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Washington won't give up acceptance, no matter what Trump does.

Dear Friend,

No matter what hateful, backwards moves are taking place in the other Washington, I'm determined to keep our values safe and our progress secure here in Washington state.

President Trump showed he will hold to his xenophobic campaign promises with a series of executive orders on immigration this week meant to build walls, not bridges.

I am saddened by this news, and angry, as I am sure that many Washingtonians are. It's more important than ever to affirm who we are. And to keep fighting for everyone in our state, and everyone who seeks refuge in our state. Our diversity of people and culture makes us stronger and more prosperous.

We will not be intimidated or divided. Washington will continue to be a place of open doors for refugees who are fleeing violence, because Washington is a state built on inclusion, compassion, and acceptance. And we will not stand by and allow Huskies and Cougars, and so many other young students on our campuses, to be turned away from their campuses and our state. They are our DREAMers and we will not allow President Trump to keep them from their dreams.

Will you join me in showing President Trump that we won't give up our Washington values?

Sign this petition to show President Trump that Washingtonians will continue to open their doors to refugees and immigrants everywhere.

SIGN ON: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAzMTg2MDgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTA4MjMwMTcwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0

We are not powerless. We will resist any attempt to reduce our nation's contribution to aiding people and families who fall victim to global humanitarian crises. Accepting refugees is part of our heritage, and we will not ignore that.

Our voices matter now more than ever. Our acceptance is an act of defiance to the new administration -- and we won't let up.

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

SIGN ON: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAzMTg2MDgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTA4MjMwMTcwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=10318608&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTA4MjMwMTcwMAS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. All content (c) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved 2017.

PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111

Privacy Policy http://jayinslee.com/privacy

Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington

subject: Tell Trump: rescind the Muslim ban (add your name)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c745/4067b0a/238c624e5/7e7b3af8/3906994693/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170128_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170128_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c745/4067b0a/238c624e5/7e7b3af9/3906994693/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170128_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170128_dnc2_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c745/4067b0a/238c624e5/7e7b3a87/3906994693/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170128_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170128_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: DSCC Membership Team
subject: Your Official Member Card >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We need Democrats united stronger than ever to take on Donald Trump and the GOP Congress. [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20170128-Membership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- Pulling together in the wake of Donald Trump's presidency has never been more important.

Just a week in, he's attacked affordable healthcare for all, immigrant families, refugees, and the right to abortion. **None of us can overcome these affronts alone, but with grassroots Democrats united, we can speak out and get mobilized.**

[**That 's why today when you pitch in a gift of ANY size, we'll send you our Official 2017 DSCC Membership Card to show you're standing with Senate Democrats in this fight >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20170128-Membership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20170128-Membership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---

Renewing your commitment to the DSCC's work helps protect our progress, elect strong Democrats, and build our movement to reverse the Trump era.

**If we want to put an end to Republicans ' disastrous leadership, only your unwavering support makes it possible.**

[**So Friend, are you ready to become an Official 2017 DSCC member? Pitch in a gift of ANY amount today so we can send your member card (free shipping on us)! >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20170128-Membership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks,
Team DSCC

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20170128-Membership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec54/2b07114c/4786ba06/7369d9a8/4287198551/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec54/2b07114c/4786ba06/7369d9ab/4287198551/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec54/2b07114c/4786ba06/7369d9aa/4287198551/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

clean_body: We need Democrats united stronger than ever to take on Donald Trump and the GOP Congress. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Friend -- Pulling together in the wake of Donald Trump's presidency has never been more important. Just a week in, he's attacked affordable healthcare for all, immigrant families, refugees, and the right to abortion. None of us can overcome these affronts alone, but with grassroots Democrats united, we can speak out and get mobilized.
